DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., erroneously sued and served in its individual capacity; and Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. as Trustee of the RMAC Pass-Through Trust, Series 2010-A DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Richard R. Sutherland, Esq. of Smith Dollar PC 707/522-1100 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Sustained with ten days leave to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
